arts.ttl: West Ham boss Julen Lopetegui injures calf in frustration during Liverpool loss
arts.sum: Lopetegui limped into the room for his post-match press conference following a heavy Hammers defeat in the Carabao Cup at Anfield.

arts.ttl: EFL Cup fourth-round draw: Liverpool, Man City to head on the road for tricky ties
arts.sum: Holders Liverpool and eight-time winners Manchester City have been given tricky away ties for the fourth round of the EFL Cup.

arts.ttl: What Arne Slot did with Liverpool team selection exposes major new problem
arts.sum: Verdict from Paul Gorst after Liverpool beat West Ham 5-1 in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: What Liverpool supporters did after substitution speaks volumes as agonising 100-day wait ends
arts.sum: Report from Anfield as Liverpool hammer West Ham 5-1 in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup fourth-round draw in full as Man Utd, Liverpool and Arsenal discover fate
arts.sum: The draw for the fourth round of the Carabao Cup has been completed, with Manchester United, Manchester City and Chelsea among the clubs to learn their fate for the October fixtures

arts.ttl: Liverpool 5-1 West Ham PLAYER RATINGS: Which Premier League winner did not look comfortable for Reds? Who's a brilliant little pest? And which Hammers man was 'brain-dead'?
arts.sum: Carabao Cup holders Liverpool came from a goal down to demolish West Ham at Anfield and book their place in the fourth round. JAMES SHARPE was at Anfield for Mail Sport.

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota double helps Liverpool to comfortable win over 10-man West Ham
arts.sum: Jota lost his place to Darwin Nunez for the 3-0 Premier League win over Bournemouth on Saturday, but the two were paired together at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher shares cheeky response to unfortunate Jarell Quansah Liverpool moment vs West Ham
arts.sum: The ever-popular former Liverpool defender made a self-depreciating joke about his personal own goal record from his playing days while on commentary duty for Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher says one Liverpool player showed glimpses of looking like a £80m star tonight
arts.sum: Liverpool summer signing Federico Chiesa made his full debut for Arne Slot’s side in Wednesday night’s League Cup meeting with West Ham. The Reds snapped...

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup fourth-round draw LIVE - Chelsea, Arsenal, Man United and Liverpool to learn next opponents
arts.sum: Plenty of big clubs are left in the draw hoping to replace Liverpool as champions
